en: I come? No, exclusive. Of course not. Invite only. It's kind of you. Before you leave,
ko: 물론 안 돼. 초대받은 사람만. 친절하네.

en: could I have a second? Yeah, what's up? I've got it. Got what? AIDS. I wanted you to hear
it from me. Fred, I'm so sorry. Brian, stop. Don't. Right now, it's between us. All right?
Just us. So please, if any of you fuss about it or frown about it, or worst of all, if
ko: 우리만. 그러니까 제발, 누가 이 일로 시끄럽게 하거나 찡그리지 말고,

en: you bore me with your sympathy, that's just seconds wasted. Seconds that could be used
ko: 가장 최악인 건, 너희의 동정심으로 나를 지루하게 만드는 거야. 그건 시간 낭비일 뿐이야.

en: making music, which is all I want to do with the time I have left. I don't have time to
ko: 음악 만드는 데 쓸 수 있는 시간인데, 그게 내가 남은 시간에 하고 싶은 전부야.
